meaning: n.资本化,股本,资本总额,大写
examples: The capitalization of constants in the Color class.
Is the index capitalization weighted or price weighted?
One of the major reasons for business failure is under-capitalization.
Lacking an official appraisal, you can try a kindred measure--the market capitalization of the REIT.
With the DEC deal comes 150 million new options for everyone, 10% of Compaq's market capitalization.
